stub 'update' supersedes (1 active); no-judge same input = 2 active (ADD fallback).

summary: Sprint 2 passes all 7 criteria. Pure reconcile core (no clock/network in reconcile.ts); LLM FactJudge isolated in fact-judge.ts with createClient + defensive 'add' fallback.
